title: Jurassic Paintings
description: Changes the Vanilla Minecraft paintings with things form the Jurassic Park/World Franchise
body:
Brings iconic moments from the _Jurassic Franchise_ into **Minecraft's** _usually boring_ paintings


Jurassic Park Franchise: © **Universal Pictures and Amblin Entertainment**. All rights reserved. **_I do not own Jurassic Park or World_**, I am just a guy who loves their hard work on this franchise and would like to bring it into **Minecraft**
